message:
feat: detect and clean up orphaned databases in .dolt-data/

Add FindOrphanedDatabases() and RemoveDatabase() to doltserver package.
Add DoltOrphanedDatabaseCheck to bd doctor. Add gt dolt cleanup command.
Update gt dolt init and gt dolt status to flag orphaned databases.

Fixes gt-lei5p

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
